issue_summary: added 3 new exceptions (subclasses of IOException) to better call out possible root causes of an IOException
javadoc_before: /** * Open an index with write access. * * @param directory the index directory * @param analyzer the analyzer to use for adding new documents * @param create true to create the index or overwrite the existing one; * false to append to the existing index */
javadoc_after: /** * Open an index with write access. * * @param directory the index directory * @param analyzer the analyzer to use for adding new documents * @param create true to create the index or overwrite the existing one; * false to append to the existing index * @throws CorruptIndexException if the index is corrupt * @throws LockObtainFailedException if another writer * has this index open (write.lock could not * be obtained) * @throws IOException if there is a low-level IO error */
